_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: No significant difference was observed among the three p53 CKO models, including survival, tumor latency, histopathology, and tumor penetrance for gliomas (Grade III/IV, 75–80% of p53 CKO mice) and GBMs (Grade IV, 50%)
details: Produced malignant gliomas in 75-80% of mice and GBMs (Grade IV) in 50% of mice, with no significant difference from other p53 CKO models
